pageDescription: Calculate BMI for individuals with overweight

results.weightToLose: Weight to Lose for Healthy BMI

definition.title: Overweight Definition
definition.description: Having a BMI between 25.0 and 29.9, which is above the healthy weight range

healthRisks.title: Health Risks
healthRisks.description: Increased risk of heart disease, diabetes, high blood pressure, and other conditions

management.title: Weight Management
management.description: Gradual weight loss through diet, exercise, and lifestyle changes is recommended

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides BMI calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Consult healthcare professionals for personalized health assessments

importantNotesList: BMI is a screening tool and not a diagnostic of body fatness or health
Muscle mass may affect BMI readings for athletes
Children and teens require age and sex-specific BMI calculations
Small weight changes can have significant health benefits

messages.enterInformation: Enter your weight and height to calculate BMI
messages.resultMessage: Your BMI calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides BMI calculations based on standard health formulas. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Individual health assessments should be conducted by qualified healthcare professionals.

seekHelp.title: Health Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized weight management and health assessments, consult with healthcare professionals, registered dietitians, or certified fitness trainers who can provide guidance based on individual needs and medical history.
